channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: McDonald's: $5 McValue Meal Deal
item.description: Choose a McDouble or McChicken plus 4pc Nuggets, small Fries, and small Coke — all for $5 via the app. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings-2026-07-18
item.description: Order any pizza online or in-app with up to 7 toppings — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — for $9.99; excludes XL and Specialty. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu
item.description: Pick 3pc Signature Chicken, 3pc Tenders, a Chicken Sandwich, or 8pc Butterfly Shrimp with sauce for just $5 — order in store, online, or in app. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Build a combo from select sandwiches, sides, and a drink for $5 every day via the app or in store. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: A Chalupa Supreme or Crunchwrap Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Crunchy Taco, and medium drink for $5.99 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: Biggie Deals from $4
item.description: Score a full combo meal — Dave's Single, chicken sandwich, or nuggets with fries and a drink — starting at $4 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: KFC: 5 Tenders for $5 Digital Deal
item.description: Grab 5 crispy chicken tenders for just $5 when you order through the KFC app or website at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dipping sauces for $16.99 — a soccer-season revival of the fan-favorite bundle. (Limited time)

item.title: Dairy Queen: $7 Meal Deal
item.description: Choose 3pc Chicken Strips or an Original Cheeseburger with regular fries, a 21oz drink, dipping sauce, and a sundae for $7 — valid in store, online, and in app. (Limited time)

item.title: Denny's: America 250 Limited-Time Menu
item.description: Denny's America 250 celebration menu runs through Aug 18 with special limited-time items including a Red, White & Berry Float and a delivery-only Spicy All-American Burrito. (Through August 18, 2026)

item.title: Insomnia Cookies: Free Delivery on $15+ with Code SWEETSUMMER
item.guid: Insomnia Cookies-Free Delivery on $15+ with Code SWEETSUM-2026-07-18
item.description: Use promo code SWEETSUMMER at online checkout to get free delivery on any Insomnia Cookies order of $15 or more — perfect for late-night cravings. (Through July 30, 2026)

item.title: Taco Bell: Nacho Fries Now Permanent + Fajita Street Chalupas LTO
item.guid: Taco Bell-Nacho Fries Now Permanent + Fajita Stree-2026-07-18
item.description: Nacho Fries are now a permanent menu item, and the new Fajita Street Chalupas are available for a limited time — check the app for combo pricing. (Limited time)

item.title: Sweetgreen: Alice Waters' Peach & Goat Cheese Salad
item.description: Chef collab limited-edition summer salad available nationwide in restaurants and via the app through August 10 — 1% of sales benefits The Edible Schoolyard Project. (Through August 10, 2026)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: New Loaded Quesadillas & Chatacoffee Lineup
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-New Loaded Quesadillas & Chatacoffee-2026-07-18
item.description: El Pollo Loco launched new Loaded Quesadillas and a Chatacoffee iced coffee lineup in June — check the app for current combo and meal pricing. (Limited time)
